chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI HCA No.276 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of CMA No.1696/20 17.03.2025 Ms. Mehmood Suleman, advocate for the appellant. Mr. Khalid Mehmood Siddiqui, advocate for respondent No.2. Syed Hussain Shah, AAG. ------- Learned counsel for the appellants after arguing at some length, does not press the listed application for restoration of appeal on the ground that since the suit reached final stage and evidence has been recorded, she would proceed with the suit on merits. In view of above, the listed application is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Imran
